reviews.review_description: The K-style ttaemiri experience is one of kind moment of my entire life! Especially, I like Shin Yura so much. She is so pretty and cute. Also, ttaemiri battle on VR is so exciting! VR games must be like this!!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your amazing review!
We’re truly happy that you enjoyed the K-style ttaemiri.

We’re especially glad that you like Shin Yura. Your kind words about her being pretty and cute mean a lot to our team. And it’s wonderful to know that you found the VR ttaemiri battle exciting! That’s exactly the kind of immersive and fun experience we aim to create. Thank you again for your support, and we’ll keep working hard to make the game even better!
